pageConfig.title: Family & Friends CPR
pageConfig.meta_description: Hands-on CPR training for parents, grandparents, babysitters, caregivers, and community groups in Wilmington, North Carolina.
pageConfig.intro: Choose a public Family & Friends CPR time when available, or request an individual, family, or group session.

course_options.clarification: Relaxed, hands-on CPR practice for families and community members. No certification card is included.
course_options.image_alt: Family CPR practice with an infant CPR manikin

delivery_help.label: EDUCATIONAL CPR
delivery_help.text: Family & Friends CPR is hands-on practice for emergency readiness and does not include a certification card.

pageConfig.fallback_note: Barnacle-without-anchor suppression is not active in the current selector path; Family & Friends CPR uses normal validated public offer rotation and may temporarily produce standalone offers.
